title: PokeGonk
description: Catch, battle, and explore in PokeGonk! This Cobblemon-inspired modpack lets you collect pokemon, delve into sprawling caves, build your dream home, and more!
body:
**Embark on a Cobblemon adventure with PokeGonk!** This exciting Minecraft modpack combines the thrill of catching and battling Cobblemon with a variety of world-enriching mods.

- **Gotta catch 'em all!** Challenge trainers and fill your Pokedex with unique Cobblemon.
- **Explore vast caverns:** Alex's Caves introduces sprawling underground worlds waiting to be discovered.
- **Build your dream home:** Craft beautiful and stylish structures with the help of Chipped.
- **Become a culinary master:** Farm & Charm lets you cook delicious and nutritious meals.
- Travel with ease: Use Waystones to teleport quickly between locations, saving you valuable time.
- **Unleash powerful magic:** Master the art of sorcery with RPG Series. Cast powerful spells to aid you on your adventure.
- **Become a paleontologist:** Unearth fossils with Jurassic Reborn, revive dinosaurs, and build your own Prehistoric Park.
